title: Typesense Analytics Event
description: Schema for analytics events logged to Typesense for tracking search behavior, clicks, conversions, and visits.

type.description: Type of analytics event being logged.

name.description: Name of the event, which must match a name defined in an analytics rule.

data.description: Event data payload containing the search query, document interaction, and user details.

q.description: The search query associated with this event.

doc_id.description: ID of the document the user interacted with.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who triggered the event.

position.description: Position of the document in the search results when the event was triggered.

tags.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata tags for categorizing and filtering events.

AnalyticsRule.description: An analytics rule that controls how search queries and events are aggregated.

name.description: Unique name for the analytics rule.

type.description: Type of analytics rule determining how data is aggregated.

params.description: Rule parameters defining source, destination, and aggregation settings.

source.description: Source configuration specifying which collections and events to track.

collections.description: Collections to monitor for search queries.

weight.description: Weight assigned to this event type for scoring.

collection.description: Collection to store the aggregated results.

counter_field.description: Field to use as a counter for counter-type rules.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to generate.

expand_query.description: Whether to expand queries for suggestion generation.
